title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited:
Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited!
